response.justification: Szabo is an accomplished staff-level software engineer with strong TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and leadership credentials. However, the role requires 8+ years shipping production-grade AI solutions, and this resume shows primarily traditional software engineering with only recent, vaguely-described exposure to GenAI infrastructure (MCP). Critical gaps include no Python, no demonstrated vector database or RAG experience, and unclear evidence of building full AI solutions rather than tooling around them.
strengths: Staff-level seniority with proven mentorship and technical leadership across multiple roles
Current work on MCP code generators and agentic workflows shows timely GenAI exposure and understanding of model context protocol
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise with 15+ years at re:cinq, plus AWS and Kubernetes infrastructure experience
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—the core hard requirement; AI work appears recent and infrastructure-focused rather than end-to-end AI systems
Missing Python (listed as primary language for role) and no demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization
No clear record of customer-facing technical leadership on AI projects or transitioning AI prototypes to production agentic workflows; past roles are primarily internal engineering
